evidence: standards/specs/MICROBOARD_NONUI.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: Choose a different Board type when work cannot produce one terminal result per activation; concurrent BlockTask routing never uses shared flow targets.
statement: A BlockTaskBoard executes one task per activation, delivers exactly one terminal success, failure, or cancellation result, releases activation resources, never calls Board complete(), and uses parameter callbacks rather than shared flow targets for concurrent routing.
